recommendations.title: Slave of the Cannibal God
recommendations.overview: A woman and her brother fly to New Guinea to look for a lost expedition, led by her husband, which has vanished in the great jungle.

recommendations.title: Torso

recommendations.title: Your Vice Is a Locked Room and Only I Have the Key
recommendations.overview: Oliviero is a drunk, burned-out writer who amuses himself by hosting orgies at his grand country manor and humiliating his wife Irina. When a number of women are murdered in grisly fashion, Oliviero becomes a prime suspect.

recommendations.title: L'allenatore nel pallone

recommendations.title: All the Colours of the Dark
recommendations.overview: After a car accident that caused the loss of her baby, Jane experiences an increasing amount of nightmares that shake her to her core. After seeking professional help, her haunting visions turn into an even more frightening reality, one full of black

recommendations.title: The Strange Vice of Mrs Wardh
recommendations.overview: When socialite and heiress Julie Wardh begins receiving blackmail letters attributed to a mysterious serial killer, she suspects her cruel and sadistic former lover Jean is behind them. With her husband Neil frequently out of town, she falls into the

recommendations.title: L'allenatore nel pallone 2
recommendations.overview: The famous Italian football coach Oronzo Canà has retired to a villa in Apulia. Now, old and tired, he is enjoying a quiet life there, cultivating his vineyard, when suddenly he is summoned to Milan, in northern Italy. There the elderly chairman of a

recommendations.title: I Origins
recommendations.overview: A molecular biologist's study of the human eye has far-reaching implications about humanity's scientific and spiritual beliefs.

recommendations.title: Grande, grosso e... Verdone
recommendations.overview: A comic movie divided in three episodes.

recommendations.title: Presto
recommendations.overview: Dignity. Poise. Mystery. We expect nothing less from the great turn-of-the-century magician, Presto. But when Presto neglects to feed his rabbit one too many times, the magician finds he isn't the only one with a few tricks up his sleeve!
